content.problemStatement: Write a C program to print $
constraints: The program should print the dollar sign exactly once.
content.outputFormat: Print a single dollar sign ($) followed by a newline.

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program prints the required dollar sign followed by a newline.
Repeated example showing the same correct output.
Another identical example confirming the output.

solution.approach: The task does not require any computation or input processing. The program simply writes the character '$' followed by a newline to standard output. This satisfies the problem statement and the constraints.
solution.timeComplexity: O(1) – constant time as only a single output operation is performed.
solution.spaceComplexity: O(1) – only a few constant‑size variables are used.
